chapters.title: (What Has Been Related) About It Being Disliked To Spit In The Masjid

chapters.title: About It Being Disliked For The People To Wait For The Imam While They Are Standing At The Beginning Of The Prayer

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About Praising Allah And Sending Salat Upon The Prophet Before Supplicating

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About Scenting The Masjid
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي تَطْيِيبِ الْمَسَاجِدِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Salat During The Night And The Day Is Two And Two
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ أَنَّ صَلاَةَ اللَّيْلِ وَالنَّهَارِ مَثْنَى مَثْنَى

chapters.title: How The Prophet Performed Voluntary Prayers During The Day
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَيْفَ كَانَ تَطَوُّعُ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِالنَّهَارِ

chapters.title: About Prayer In A Woman's Cover Being Disliked
chapters.title_arabic: باب فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ الصَّلاَةِ فِي لُحُفِ النِّسَاءِ

chapters.title: (Mentioning) What Is Allowed From Walking And Actions During Voluntary Salat
chapters.title_arabic: باب ذِكْرِ مَا يَجُوزُ مِنَ الْمَشْىِ وَالْعَمَلِ فِي صَلاَةِ التَّطَوُّعِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About Reciting Two Surat In A Rak'ah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي قِرَاءَةِ سُورَتَيْنِ فِي رَكْعَةٍ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About The Virtue Of Walking To The Masjid And What Rewards Are Written For Each Step One Takes

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About Salat After Maghrib Is More Virtuous In The House

chapters.title: (What Has Been Mentioned) About A Man Performing Ghusl When He Accepts Islam
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي الاِغْتِسَالِ عِنْدَمَا يُسْلِمُ الرَّجُلُ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About The Tasmiyah When Entering The Area Of Relieving Oneself
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ مِنَ التَّسْمِيَةِ عِنْدَ دُخُولِ الْخَلاَءِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned Of The Mark Of This Nation From The Traces Of Prostrations And Purification On The Day Of Resurrection
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ مِنْ سِيمَا هَذِهِ الأُمَّةِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ مِنْ آثَارِ السُّجُودِ وَالطُّهُورِ

chapters.title: That Starting From The Right Is Recommended In Purification
chapters.title_arabic: باب ما يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ التَّيَمُّنِ فِي الطُّهُورِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About The Amount Of Water That IS Acceptable For Wudu
chapters.title_arabic: باب قَدْرِ مَا يُجْزِئُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ فِي الْوُضُوءِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About Sprinkling Water On The Urine Of A Male Child Of Suckling Age
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي نَضْحِ بَوْلِ الْغُلاَمِ الرَّضِيعِ

chapters.title: What has been mentioned about the Prophet (saws) performing Mas-h after the revelation of (Surat) Al-Ma'idah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي مَسْحِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بَعْدَ نُزُولِ الْمَائِدَةِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About The Permission For The Sexually Impure (Junub) Person To Eat And Sleep When He Performs Wudu
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي الرُّخْصَةِ لِلْجُنُبِ فِي الأَكْلِ وَالنَّوْمِ إِذَا تَوَضَّأَ

chapters.title: What Has Been Mentioned About The Virtue Of The Salat
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا ذُكِرَ فِي فَضْلِ الصَّلاَةِ

chapters.title: Something Else About That
chapters.title_arabic: باب مِنْهُ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related From The Messenger of Allah About The Severe Warning Against Withholding Zakat
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي مَنْعِ الزَّكَاةِ مِنَ التَّشْدِيدِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: When You Pay The Zakat You Have Fulfilled What Is Required Of You
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ إِذَا أَدَّيْتَ الزَّكَاةَ فَقَدْ قَضَيْتَ مَا عَلَيْكَ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Zakat On Gold And Silver
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زَكَاةِ الذَّهَبِ وَالْوَرِقِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Zakat On Camels and Sheep
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زَكَاةِ الإِبِلِ وَالْغَنَمِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Zakat On Cows
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زَكَاةِ الْبَقَرِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About It Being Disliked To Take The Choicest Wealth For Charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَخْذِ خِيَارِ الْمَالِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Charity Due On Plants, Fruits And Grains
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَدَقَةِ الزَّرْعِ وَالتَّمْرِ وَالْحُبُوبِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: There Is No Charity Due On Horses And Slaves
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ لَيْسَ فِي الْخَيْلِ وَالرَّقِيقِ صَدَقَةٌ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Zakat On Honey
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زَكَاةِ الْعَسَلِ ‏.‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: There Is No Zakat On Acquired Wealth Until The Hawl Has Passed
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ لاَ زَكَاةَ عَلَى الْمَالِ الْمُسْتَفَادِ حَتَّى يَحُولَ عَلَيْهِ الْحَوْلُ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: There Is No Jizyah Required From The Muslims
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِينَ جِزْيَةٌ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Zakat On Jewelry
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زَكَاةِ الْحُلِيِّ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Zakat On Greens (Produce)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي زَكَاةِ الْخُضْرَوَاتِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Charity On What Is Watered By Rivers Or Otherwise

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Zakat On The Orphan's Wealth

chapters.title: What Has Been Related That The Injuries Caused By The Animal Are Without Liability And The Khumus Is Due On Rikaz
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ أَنَّ الْعَجْمَاءَ جُرْحُهَا جُبَارٌ وَفِي الرِّكَازِ الْخُمُسُ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Al-Khars (Assessment)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْخَرْصِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The One Who Works In Collecting Sadaqah In Truth

chapters.title: (What Has Been Related) About The One Who Commits Transgression With Charity

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: Charity Is Taken from The Rich To Be Distributed To The Poor

chapters.title: (What Has Been Reported About) For Whom The Zakat Is Lawful
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ مَنْ تَحِلُّ لَهُ الزَّكَاةُ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: For Whom Charity Is Not Lawful
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ مَنْ لاَ تَحِلُّ لَهُ الصَّدَقَةُ

chapters.title: (What Has Been Related About) The Indebted And Others For Whom Charity Is Lawful
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ مَنْ تَحِلُّ لَهُ الصَّدَقَةُ مِنَ الْغَارِمِينَ وَغَيْرِهِمْ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: There Is A Duty On Wealthy Aside From Zakat
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ أَنَّ فِي الْمَالِ حَقًّا سِوَى الزَّكَاةِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Virtue Of Charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ الصَّدَقَةِ

chapters.title: , What Has Been Related About The Right Of The One Asking
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي حَقِّ السَّائِلِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Giving To Those Whose Hearts Are Inclined (Toward Islam)

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمُتَصَدِّقِ يَرِثُ صَدَقَتَهُ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About It Being Disliked To Take Back Charity
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ الْعَوْدِ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About (Giving) Charity On Behalf Of The Dead
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّدَقَةِ عَنِ الْمَيِّتِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَدَقَةِ الْفِطْرِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: It Is To Be Paid Before The Salat
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَقْدِيمِهَا قَبْلَ الصَّلاَةِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَعْجِيلِ الزَّكَاةِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Prohibition Of Begging
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنِ الْمَسْأَلَةِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: Do Not Precede The Month With Fasting
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ لاَ تَقَدَّمُوا الشَّهْرَ بِصَوْمٍ ‏‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About It Being Disliked To Fast The Day OF Doubt
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ صَوْمِ يَوْمِ الشَّكِّ ‏‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting Based Upon Testimony
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الصَّوْمِ بِالشَّهَادَةِ ‏

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: The Two Months Of Eid Will Not Both Be Deficient

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: For The People OF Every Land There Is A Sighting

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: (The Fast Is The Day The People Fast And) The Breaking Of The Fast IS The Day When the People Break The Fast, And The Sacrifice Is The Day The People Sacrifice

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي تَأْخِيرِ السُّحُورِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي بَيَانِ الْفَجْرِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ السُّحُورِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About It Being Disliked To Fast While Traveling
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ الصَّوْمِ فِي السَّفَرِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Permission To Fast While Traveling
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ مِنَ الرُّخْصَةِ فِي الصَّوْمِ فِي السَّفَرِ

chapters.title: (What Has Been Related About The Atonement)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْكَفَّارَةِ فِي الصَّوْمِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Atonement For Breaking The Fast During Ramadan
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَفَّارَةِ الْفِطْرِ فِي رَمَضَانَ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي السِّوَاكِ لِلصَّائِمِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْكُحْلِ لِلصَّائِمِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقُبْلَةِ لِلصَّائِمِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي مُبَاشَرَةِ الصَّائِمِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: There Is No Fast For The One Who Did Not Determine It During The (Preceding) Night

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَوْمِ الْمُحَرَّمِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting On Friday

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About It Being Disliked To Fast On Friday Alone

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting On Saturday
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَوْمِ يَوْمِ السَّبْتِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting On Monday And Thursday
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَوْمِ يَوْمِ الاِثْنَيْنِ وَالْخَمِيسِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting On Wednesday and Thursday
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَوْمِ يَوْمِ الأَرْبِعَاءِ وَالْخَمِيسِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Virtue OF Fasting On The Day of Arafah
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ صَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About It Being Disliked To Fast The Day of Arafah While At Arafat
chapters.title_arabic: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ صَوْمِ يَوْمِ عَرَفَةَ بِعَرَفَةَ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Encouragement To Fast The Day Of Ashura

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Permission To Not Fast The Day Of Ashura

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting The Ten (Days Of Dhul-Hijjah)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صِيَامِ الْعَشْرِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Deeds During The Ten Days (Of Dhul-Hijjah)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْعَمَلِ فِي أَيَّامِ الْعَشْرِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صِيَامِ سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ شَوَّالٍ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting Three (Days) Of Every Month
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَوْمِ ثَلاَثَةِ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ كُلِّ شَهْرٍ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Virtues Of Fasting
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي فَضْلِ الصَّوْمِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting Daily
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي صَوْمِ الدَّهْرِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Fasting Consecutive Days

chapters.title_arabic: باب آخَرُ

chapters.title: What has been related about the saying of the Prophet (saws): The Lahd is for us and the Hole is for other than us

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا يَقُولُ الرَّجُلُ إِذَا دَخَلَ الْمَقَابِرَ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الدَّفْنِ بِاللَّيْلِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي النَّهْىِ عَنِ التَّبَتُّلِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About: There Is No Marriage Except With Proof (Bayyinah)
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ لاَ نِكَاحَ إِلاَّ بِبَيِّنَةٍ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي خُطْبَةِ النِّكَاحِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About The Virtue Of That

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About A Person Who Marries A Woman, Then Divorces Her Before Having Intercourse With Her: Can He Marry Her Daughter Or Not?

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِيمَنْ يُطَلِّقُ امْرَأَتَهُ ثَلاَثًا فَيَتَزَوَّجُهَا آخَرُ فَيُطَلِّقُهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ بِهَا

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ مَهْرِ الْبَغِيِّ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Azl
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْعَزْلِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Azl Being Disliked
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ الْعَزْلِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Dividing Time For The Virgin And The Matron
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْقِسْمَةِ لِلْبِكْرِ وَالثَّيِّبِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About Equality Between Co-Wives
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي التَّسْوِيَةِ بَيْنَ الضَّرَائِرِ

chapters.title: What Has Been Related About a Man Who Died Before Stipulating The Dowry For Her
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ الْمَرْأَةَ فَيَمُوتُ عَنْهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يَفْرِضَ لَهَا

chapters.title: What has been related about: Suckling makes unlawful whatever lineage makes unlawful
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ يُحَرَّمُ مِنَ الرَّضَاعِ مَا يُحَرَّمُ مِنَ النَّسَبِ ‏

chapters.title: What has been related about a man's milk
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي لَبَنِ الْفَحْلِ ‏

chapters.title: What has been related about: One sip or two sips will not make a prohibition
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ لاَ تُحَرِّمُ الْمَصَّةُ وَلاَ الْمَصَّتَانِ ‏

chapters.title: What has been related about one woman's testimony about suckling
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي شَهَادَةِ الْمَرْأَةِ الْوَاحِدَةِ فِي الرَّضَاعِ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ مَا يُذْهِبُ مَذَمَّةَ الرَّضَاعِ ‏

chapters.title: What has been related about a slave woman who is freed but she has a husband
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الْمَرْأَةِ تُعْتَقُ وَلَهَا زَوْجٌ ‏

chapters.title: What has been related about the child the bed belong to
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ أَنَّ الْوَلَدَ لِلْفِرَاشِ ‏

chapters.title: What has been related about a man who sees a woman and becomes fascinated with her
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الرَّجُلِ يَرَى الْمَرْأَةَ تُعْجِبُهُ ‏‏

chapters.title: What has been related about the husband's rights over the wife
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي حَقِّ الزَّوْجِ عَلَى الْمَرْأَةِ

chapters.title: What has been related about a woman's rights over her husband
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي حَقِّ الْمَرْأَةِ عَلَى زَوْجِهَا

chapters.title: What has been mentioned about it being disliked to enter women in their behinds
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ إِتْيَانِ النِّسَاءِ فِي أَدْبَارِهِنَّ

chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فى كَرَاهِيَةِ خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الزِّينَةِ

chapters.title: What has been related about jealousy
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فى الْغَيْرَةِ

chapters.title: What has been related about it being disliked for a woman to travel alone
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ أَنْ تُسَافِرَ الْمَرْأَةُ وَحْدَهَا بِغَيْرِ مَحْرَمٍ

chapters.title: What has been related about it being disliked to enter upon women whose husbands are absent
chapters.title_arabic: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي كَرَاهِيَةِ الدُّخُولِ عَلَى الْمُغِيبَاتِ

chapters.title: The warning about that due to the Shaitan flowing (through the body) like the flow of blood
The Shaitan seeks to tempt the woman when she goes out
chapters.title_arabic: باب

chapters.title: The threat for the woman who annoys her husband
